_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user shared screenshots from PageSpeed Insights/Lighthouse for halifax-now. Mobile performance analysis reveals poor First Contentful Paint (FCP at 3.5s) and Largest Contentful Paint (LCP at 7.5s), along with high Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS at 0.326) and Speed Index issues. Key problems include:

- Layout shifts caused by the v4-hero section
- 267ms unattributed forced reflow
- Render-blocking JavaScript (user-agent.js, broadsheet-ui.js)
- Cache TTL set to none for numerous assets (potential ~1.6MB savings)
- Large image delivery issues
- Unused CSS from block-library

These factors contribute to suboptimal mobile performance that requires optimization.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

Exploring the repo to see what we can change for the PageSpeed findings. Your message had no explicit question—we're treating this as planning performance fixes for halifax-now.ca.

      "codeBlock": {

          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": " * Enqueue assets."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "function hfx_broadsheet_enqueue_assets() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\twp_enqueue_style("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\t\t'hfx-broadsheet-fonts',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\t\t'https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anton\u0026family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500\u0026family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,700;1,900\u0026family=Source+Serif+4:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400\u0026family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;700\u0026display=swap',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\t\tarray(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\t\tnull"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "\t);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\twp_enqueue_style("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\t\t'hfx-broadsheet-style',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\t\tget_stylesheet_uri(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "\t\tarray('hfx-broadsheet-fonts'),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "\t\twp_get_theme()-\u003eget('Version')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "\t);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "\twp_enqueue_style("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "\t\t'hfx-broadsheet-core',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "\t\tget_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/css/broadsheet.css',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "\t\tarray('hfx-broadsheet-style'),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "\t\twp_get_theme()-\u003eget('Version')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "\t);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "\twp_enqueue_script("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\t\t'hfx-broadsheet-ui',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\t\tget_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/js/broadsheet-ui.js',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "\t\tarray(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "\t\twp_get_theme()-\u003eget('Version'),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "\t\ttrue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\t);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\twp_localize_script("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\t\t'hfx-broadsheet-ui',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\t\t'HFXThemeData',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\t\tarray("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "\t\t\t'events'    =\u003e hfx_get_events_payload(120),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "\t\t\t'now'       =\u003e current_time('mysql'),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "\t\t\t'browseUrl' =\u003e hfx_events_base_url(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "\t\t)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\t);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\tif ( is_page_template( 'page-map.php' ) || is_page( 'map' ) ) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "\t\twp_enqueue_style("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\t\t\t'hfx-leaflet-css',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\t\t\t'https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "\t\t\tarray(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\t\t\t'1.9.4'"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "\t\t);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\t\twp_enqueue_script("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\t\t\t'hfx-leaflet-js',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\t\t\t'https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\t\t\tarray(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\t\t\t'1.9.4',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\t\t\ttrue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\t\t);"
          },

            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'hfx_broadsheet_enqueue_assets');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": " * Canonical listing route."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": " *"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": " * @return string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "function hfx_events_base_url() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "\treturn home_url('/events/');"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": " * Feature flag for additive v3 sections/nav rollout."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": " *"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": " * OFF by default for production safety."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": " * Enable with either:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": " * - define('HFX_V3_SECTIONS_ENABLED', true); in wp-config.php, or"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": " * - WP option &#96;hfx_v3_sections_enabled&#96; set to 1."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": " *"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": " * @return bool"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "function hfx_is_v3_sections_enabled() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "\t// Emergency override: keep v3 sections hidden until rollout is explicitly re-enabled."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "\treturn false;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": " * Preview entrypoint for v3 pages."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": " *"
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"v4-root\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "\t\u003cheader class=\"v4-mast\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "\t\t\u003cdiv class=\"v4-datestamp\"\u003e\u003c?php echo esc_html(date_i18n('D · M j')); ?\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan class=\"hot\"\u003e\u003c?php"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "\t\t\tif ( $hfx_volume \u0026\u0026 $hfx_issue ) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\t\t\t\techo esc_html( 'VOL ' . $hfx_volume . ' · NO ' . $hfx_issue );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "\t\t\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "\t\t\t\tesc_html_e( 'Halifax Now', 'halifax-now-broadsheet' );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "\t\t?\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "\t\t\u003cdiv class=\"v4-logo\"\u003eHalifax\u003cspan class=\"amp\"\u003e,\u003c/span\u003e Now\u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "\t\t\u003cdiv class=\"v4-tag\"\u003e\u003c?php esc_html_e('The city, weekly.', 'halifax-now-broadsheet'); ?\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\u003cspan class=\"red\"\u003e\u003c?php esc_html_e('Do stuff. Have fun.', 'halifax-now-broadsheet'); ?\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "\t\u003c/header\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "\t\u003cnav class=\"v4-nav\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "\t\t\u003ca href=\"\u003c?php echo esc_url(home_url('/')); ?\u003e\"\u003e\u003c?php esc_html_e('Home', 'halifax-now-broadsheet'); ?\u003e\u003c/a\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "\t\t\u003ca href=\"\u003c?php echo esc_url($browse_url); ?\u003e\"\u003e\u003c?php esc_html_e('All Listings', 'halifax-now-broadsheet'); ?\u003e\u003c/a\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "\t\t\u003ca href=\"\u003c?php echo esc_url($browse_url . '?quick=tonight'); ?\u003e\"\u003e\u003c?php esc_html_e('Tonight', 'halifax-now-broadsheet'); ?\u003e\u003c/a\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "\t\t\u003ca href=\"\u003c?php echo esc_url($browse_url . '?quick=weekend'); ?\u003e\"\u003e\u003c?php esc_html_e('Weekend', 'halifax-now-broadsheet'); ?\u003e\u003c/a\u003e"
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "\t\t\u003ca href=\"\u003c?php echo esc_url($venues_url); ?\u003e\"\u003e\u003c?php esc_html_e('Venues', 'halifax-now-broadsheet'); ?\u003e\u003c/a\u003e"
          },

          },
          {

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Staging Setup (New Design)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "This project deploys the WordPress theme directly to Plesk via GitHub Actions."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "For staging, use the dedicated workflow:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "- &#96;.github/workflows/deploy-theme-plesk-staging.yml&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "It auto-runs on pushes to the &#96;staging&#96; branch, and can also be run manually from the Actions tab."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "## 1) Add staging GitHub secrets"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "In your GitHub repo settings, create:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- &#96;PLESK_STAGING_THEME_PATH&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- &#96;PLESK_STAGING_SSH_HOST&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- &#96;PLESK_STAGING_SSH_USER&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "- &#96;PLESK_STAGING_SSH_KEY&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "- &#96;PLESK_STAGING_SSH_PORT&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "These should point at your staging server/site, not production."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "## 2) Deploy the new design to staging"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "Push your new-design theme changes to the &#96;staging&#96; branch."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "The staging workflow syncs:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "- &#96;wp-content/themes/halifax-now-broadsheet/&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "You can also run manual &#96;dry_run&#96; deploys before a full transfer."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "## 3) Enable v3 sections in staging"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "The new additive sections are feature-flagged in theme code."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "Enable one of:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "- &#96;define('HFX_V3_SECTIONS_ENABLED', true);&#96; in staging &#96;wp-config.php&#96;, or"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "- WP option &#96;hfx_v3_sections_enabled = 1&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "Without this, staging will still show the base broadsheet nav without v3 section links."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "## 4) Quick verification checklist"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "- Homepage renders with the latest broadsheet style."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "- &#96;/v3-preview/?v3=1&#96; loads."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "- If flag enabled: top nav includes &#96;Run Clubs&#96;, &#96;Happy Hour&#96;, &#96;Patios&#96;."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "- &#96;/events/&#96;, &#96;/map/&#96;, &#96;/venues/&#96;, and &#96;/submit/&#96; still load."
          }
        ],

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Key findings for CLS on v4-hero: Lighthouse attributed the Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) entirely to the `<section class="v4-hero">` element. Likely causes include:

- Web fonts (Anton, Playfair, Space Grotesk) loading and causing text reflow
- A two-column grid where the right column's variable content height or image loading may cause shifts
- The h1 using a large clamp() with custom fonts
- `.hfx-event-img` lacking an explicit aspect ratio, which could shift layout when background images load

The screenshot indicates the shift occurs within the hero section's preview, showing "BROADSHEET EDITION DO STUFF...".</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The `.v4-card-img` class applies an aspect ratio of 4:3 to images within its wrapper. The event card likely uses `v4-card-img` on the container, so we need to verify the markup. Lighthouse flagged `.hfx-event-img__bg` for "Improve image delivery"  the base `.hfx-event-img` may need `width:100%` + `aspect-ratio` when used inside v4-wall cards.

CLS on v4-hero is possibly caused by web fonts loading in the picks column or grid reflow when fonts load on the left h1.

Plan:

- **Server cache headers**  Not in repo (.htaccess missing); document for Flywheel/Kinsta/host panel or nginx config.
- **Mu-plugin extensions:**</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The theme JavaScript does not obviously cause forced reflows from geometric queries in hot paths, but Leaflet maps might. For the home page, `applyBrowseFilters` runs and `render()` performs innerHTML on count and row.hidden, which could cause reflows. The 267ms unattributed time might come from WordPress core, another plugin, or Leaflet on the map page (since the users test was on the home page, the map wasnt loaded). On the home page, `applyBrowseFilters` may not run if there's no `[data-hfx-browse]` element. This includes:  
- bindSurpriseButtons  
- bindHeroSearch  
- applyBrowseFilters (early return if no browse root)  
- renderMapPins (early return if no map) On the home page, most functions return early: `bindSurpriseButtons`, `bindHeroSearch`, `applyBrowseFilters`, and `renderMapPins`.

Forced reflows may stem from web fonts or a plugin like `user-agent.js` (likely not in the repo). Identify the source of `user-agent.js` in production and consider reducing the `HFXThemeData` payloadcurrently localizing 120 events on every page, which increases parse time and blocks rendering. A performance improvement would be to avoid passing all events to every page or fetch them asynchronously via REST API.</details></think>

  "plan": "# PageSpeed / Lighthouse follow-up (mobile)\n\nYour screenshots point to **poor LCP (7.5s) and FCP (3.5s)**, **CLS 0.326** (entirely attributed to [&#96;.v4-hero&#96;](wp-content/themes/halifax-now-broadsheet/assets/css/broadsheet.css) in the “Layout shift culprits” panel), **~1.6MB+ “no cache”** on first-party assets, **render-blocking** &#96;broadsheet-ui.js&#96; and &#96;user-agent.js&#96;, **large event images** (especially [&#96;.hfx-event-img__bg&#96;](wp-content/themes/halifax-now-broadsheet/functions.php) &#96;background-image&#96; usage), and **~14KB unused** &#96;block-library/style.min.css&#96;.\n\nThis plan is ordered by **impact vs. risk** and calls out what is **in-repo** vs. **server / WordPress admin**.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nflowchart LR\n  subgraph hosting [Hosting]\n    Cache[Cache-Control for static assets]\n  end\n  subgraph theme [Theme and MU plugin]\n    Img[Responsive img + dimensions]\n    Fonts[Hero font stability / preload]\n    Defer[Defer non-critical JS]\n    Dequeue[Dequeue unused block CSS where safe]\n    Payload[Shrink HFXThemeData localize]\n  end\n  Cache --\u003e LCP[LCP/FCP repeat visits]\n  Img --\u003e LCP\n  Fonts --\u003e CLS[CLS in v4-hero]\n  Defer --\u003e FCP[FCP/LCP lab]\n  Dequeue --\u003e FCP\n  Payload --\u003e TBT[TBT / main thread]\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## 1. Caching (~1.6 MiB Lab “efficient cache lifetimes”)\n\n**Cause:** Responses are served without long-lived **Cache-Control** / **Expires** for images, CSS, and JS under &#96;halifax-now.ca&#96;.\n\n**Action:** Configure the **web stack** that sits in front of WordPress (nginx, Apache, Cloudflare, host panel, etc.) so static extensions get long &#96;max-age&#96; (and immutable naming is already partly handled via &#96;?ver=&#96; query strings). This repo has **no** [.htaccess](.) checked in—changes will be wherever the site is hosted.\n\n**Outcome:** Repeat visits stop re-downloading large logos/posters (biggest win from your “Use efficient cache lifetimes” panel).\n\n---\n\n## 2. Images and LCP (“Improve image delivery”, large WebP/PNG/JPEG)\n\n**Current behavior:** [&#96;hfx_event_image_html()&#96;](wp-content/themes/halifax-now-broadsheet/functions.php) renders event art as a **CSS &#96;background-image&#96;** on &#96;.hfx-event-img__bg&#96; without intrinsic sizing from the asset; cards use [&#96;aspect-ratio&#96;](wp-content/themes/halifax-now-broadsheet/assets/css/broadsheet.css) on &#96;.v4-card-img&#96; / &#96;.v4-feat-img&#96;, while the base &#96;.hfx-event-img&#96; relies on layout context—verify every grid path reserves height.\n\n**Recommended direction:**\n\n- Prefer **&#96;\u003cpicture\u003e&#96; / &#96;\u003cimg\u003e&#96;** with **&#96;width&#96; and &#96;height&#96;** (or consistent &#96;aspect-ratio&#96; on &#96;.hfx-event-img&#96; everywhere it appears), **&#96;decoding=\"async\"&#96;**, and **&#96;loading=\"lazy\"&#96;** for below-the-fold cards; **&#96;fetchpriority=\"high\"&#96;** for the single above-the-fold hero/lead image only.\n- Where WordPress attachments exist, use **core helpers** (&#96;wp_get_attachment_image&#96; with responsive &#96;srcset&#96;/&#96;sizes&#96;) instead of raw URLs.\n- **Re-export or compress** the worst offenders flagged in PSI (455KiB WebP still flagged as compressible; 402KiB PNG → WebP/AVIF). That is partly **CMS/media workflow**, partly theme markup.\n\n---\n\n## 3. CLS on &#96;.v4-hero&#96; (score 0.326)\n\nThe hero in [&#96;front-page.php&#96;](wp-content/themes/halifax-now-broadsheet/front-page.php) uses **large display typography** ([&#96;.v4-hero h1&#96;](wp-content/themes/halifax-now-broadsheet/assets/css/broadsheet.css) Anton + stroke) and **Google Fonts**. With &#96;display=swap&#96;, **font swap layout** is a common cause of CLS in exactly this region.\n\n**Approaches (combine as needed):**\n\n- **Reserve space for the headline:** e.g. predictable &#96;min-height&#96; on the heading block for mobile breakpoints, or adjusted &#96;line-height&#96; / [&#96;line-gap-override&#96;](https://developer.chrome.com/blog/font-fallbacks) via &#96;@font-face&#96; overrides for fallback fonts (more work, best CLS reduction).\n- **&#96;font-display: optional&#96;** for heavy display fonts on mobile only (trade: occasional fallback font)—policy decision.\n- **Preload** the single most impactful font file used for the LCP text (typically Anton), via &#96;wp_head&#96; with the correct **woff2 URL** derived from the Google Fonts CSS (narrow, testable change).\n\nValidate with Lighthouse “CLS” overlay after each step.\n\n---\n\n## 4. Render-blocking JS (&#96;broadsheet-ui.js&#96;; &#96;user-agent.js&#96;)\n\n**Theme:** [&#96;hfx_broadsheet_enqueue_assets&#96;](wp-content/themes/halifax-now-broadsheet/functions.php) already passes &#96;true&#96; as the fifth argument (**footer**) for [&#96;broadsheet-ui.js&#96;](wp-content/themes/halifax-now-broadsheet/assets/js/broadsheet-ui.js), but Lighthouse still counts it as blocking if scripts run before paint—add an explicit **&#96;defer&#96;** attribute via &#96;script_loader_tag&#96; for known handles (&#96;hfx-broadsheet-ui&#96;), after confirming no dependency on synchronous third-party globals on that page.\n\n**&#96;user-agent.js&#96;:** **Not present** in this repository (search is empty)—it is almost certainly **another plugin or MU-plugin on production**. Identify it via **View Source** or DevTools Network on production, then either remove, defer, or defer+move to footer in that plugin’s codebase or a small MU-plugin dequeue.\n\n---\n\n## 5. Unused CSS (&#96;wp-block-library/style.min.css&#96;)\n\nExtend [&#96;hfxnow-performance.php&#96;](wp-content/mu-plugins/hfxnow-performance.php): **conditionally dequeue** &#96;wp-block-library&#96; (and related handles if needed) on templates that **do not render block editor content** (classic theme pages). **Safety:** smoke-test &#96;/events/&#96; and any page that uses blocks in post content—if blocks exist, **do not** dequeue globally.\n\n---\n\n## 6. Large localized payload (&#96;HFXThemeData&#96;)\n\n[&#96;wp_localize_script&#96;](wp-content/themes/halifax-now-broadsheet/functions.php) passes **&#96;hfx_get_events_payload(120)&#96;** into every page using the theme scripts. That inflates HTML, parsing time, and contributes to **main-thread work**.\n\n**Directions:**\n\n- Reduce the limit on **non-browse** templates (home could pass far fewer IDs or no list if features allow).\n- Or load filter data via **REST** after first paint on pages that only need “Surprise me” / map.\n\n---\n\n## 7. Forced reflow (267 ms, unattributed)\n\nTheme JS on the home path is mostly **surprise/search** wiring; **[&#96;Leaflet&#96;](wp-content/themes/halifax-now-broadsheet/assets/js/broadsheet-ui.js)** runs only when &#96;[data-hfx-map-canvas]&#96; exists. The **unattributed** reflow often comes from **third-party or WordPress core** scripts.
